daily_take.headline: Rangers moneyline just jumped 7.5 points. Smart money moving or late money panic?
daily_take.deck: Rangers hit 57.5% in 24 hours on $818K volume, a solid swing that suggests either sharp action ahead of puck drop or public money chasing recent momentum. At this price, you're paying for a hot team narrative rather than a true edge. Panthers are undervalued here if this line moves on sentiment alone, not injury updates or goalie changes. Sharp bettors should wait for confirmation: does volume stay heavy into game time, or does this price settle as a top-heavy pump.
